name: L3HARRIS TECHNOLOGIES, INC. /DE/
sic_description: Search, Detection, Navigation, Guidance, Aeronautical Sys
summary: L3Harris Technologies is a defense technology company delivering end-to-end solutions connecting space, air, land, sea, and cyber domains. Products include tactical radios, night vision goggles, ISR systems, missile propulsion, space communications, electronic warfare systems, and autonomous vessels. They serve U.S. Government agencies, prime contractors, and international allies in over 100 countries, with fiscal 2025 revenue including $4.8 billion from international customers.
